title: [MTR4] TriMet LRV Pack
description: This resource pack adds a TriMet livery of the S700 (type 6) to Minecraft Transit Railway 4
body:
This resource pack adds a TriMet type 6 version of the Siemens S700 light rail vehicle included in Minecraft Transit Railway 4. MTR4 is required to use this pack. This pack includes high-floor and low-floor versions, as well as variants with and without pantographs.

## Future Plans
### v2.0
- Type 5 S700
- Type 4 S70
### v3.0
- Type 3 SD660
- Type 2 SD660
- Type 1
